perturbation.original_text: 14. Communications . Except with the prior permission of the other party, all communications regarding the Potential Transaction and requests for information shall be directed to Eddie Lazarus, in the case of requests regarding the Company, and Chris Mansolillo, in the case of requests regarding Sony Pictures. Each party agrees not to contact any stockholder, director, officer, employee or agent of the other party, or any customer, supplier or other person having a business relationship with the other party, regarding the Potential Transaction, except with the prior permission of the other party.
perturbation.changed_text: 14. Communications . Except with the prior permission of the other party, all communications regarding the Potential Transaction and requests for information shall be directed to Eddie Lazarus, in the case of requests regarding the Company, and Chris Mansolillo, in the case of requests regarding Sony Pictures. Each party may contact any stockholder, director, officer, employee or agent of the other party, or any customer, supplier or other person having a business relationship with the other party, regarding the Potential Transaction.
perturbation.explanation: The modification of Section 14 introduces a contradiction. The removal of the need for prior permission creates an in-text contradiction, causing uncertainty around the procedure for contact
perturbation.contradicted_text: 14. Communications . Except with the prior permission of the other party, all communications regarding the Potential Transaction and requests for information shall be directed to Eddie Lazarus, in the case of requests regarding the Company, and Chris Mansolillo, in the case of requests regarding Sony Pictures. Each party may contact any stockholder, director, officer, employee or agent of the other party, or any customer, supplier or other person having a business relationship with the other party, regarding the Potential Transaction.
perturbation.justification: The original text of Section 14 prohibited contacting stakeholders without prior permission. The changed text removes the 'prior permission' requirement, stating that 'Each party may contact any stockholder...'. The Contradicted Text is the Changed Text and the Perturbation explanation clearly defines why this leads to a contradiction, making the communication procedure uncertain and inconsistent. Therefore, a strong in-text contradiction exists.

perturbation.original_text: 21. General Provisions. (a) The parties shall maintain reasonable security measures to safeguard each other’s personally identifiable information from loss, misuse, unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration or destruction. (b) The parties shall supply personally identifiable information to each other only in accordance with, and to the extent permitted by, applicable laws relating to privacy and data protection in the applicable territories. Personally identifiable information supplied by Company to Sony Pictures will be retained and used in accordance with the Sony Pictures Safe Harbor Privacy Policy, located at http://www.sonypictures.com/corp/eu_safe_harbor.html . (c) This Agreement contains the full and complete understanding of the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior and contemporaneous agreements, representations and understandings, whether oral or written, with respect to the subject matter hereof. (d) This Agreement may not be amended, waived or modified except by a single instrument in writing executed by duly authorized representatives of the parties. (e) This Agreement will be fairly interpreted and construed in accordance with its terms and without strict interpretation or construction in favor of or against either party. (f) For purposes of this Agreement, the term “person” shall be broadly interpreted to include without limitation any corporation, company, group, partnership and natural person. (g) In the event that any provision of this Agreement is held by a court of competent jurisdiction or arbitrator to be void, voidable, unlawful or for any reason unenforceable, in whole or in part, such provision will be deemed and construed to extend only to the maximum permitted by law so as to effectuate the intent of the parties, and the remainder of this Agreement will continue in full force and effect and enforceable according to its terms. (h) To the extent that any Confidential Information may include materials subject to the attorney-client privilege, work product doctrine or any other applicable privilege concerning pending or threatened legal proceedings or governmental investigations, each party hereto understands and agrees that both parties hereto and their Representatives have a commonality of interest with respect to such matters and it is the desire, intention and mutual understanding of both parties hereto that the sharing of such Confidential Information is not intended to, and shall not, waive or diminish in any way the confidentiality of such Confidential Information or its continued protection under the attorney-client privilege, work product doctrine or other applicable privilege. All Confidential Information provided by either party hereto that is entitled to protection under the attorney-client privilege, work product doctrine or other applicable privilege shall remain entitled to such protection under those privileges, this Agreement, and under the joint defense doctrine. CONFIDENTIAL 7(i) This Agreement may be executed by manual or facsimile or other electronically transmitted signatures and in any number of counterparts, each of which will be deemed an original and all which together will constitute one and the same instrument.

(a) The parties shall maintain reasonable security measures to safeguard each other’s personally identifiable information from loss, misuse, unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration or destruction. perturbation.explanation: The modification of Section 21 introduces a contradiction. The addition of use at Sony Pictures discretion contradicts the data protection outlined in section 21(b), causing uncertainty around data protection.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 21. General Provisions. (a) The parties shall maintain reasonable security measures to safeguard each other’s personally identifiable information from loss, misuse, unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration or destruction. (b) The parties shall supply personally identifiable information to each other only in accordance with, and to the extent permitted by, applicable laws relating to privacy and data protection in the applicable territories. Personally identifiable information supplied by Company to Sony Pictures will be retained and used at Sony Pictures discretion. (c) This Agreement contains the full and complete understanding of the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior and contemporaneous agreements, representations and understandings, whether oral or written, with respect to the subject matter hereof. (d) This Agreement may not be amended, waived or modified except by a single instrument in writing executed by duly authorized representatives of the parties. (e) This Agreement will be fairly interpreted and construed in accordance with its terms and without strict interpretation or construction in favor of or against either party. (f) For purposes of this Agreement, the term “person” shall be broadly interpreted to include without limitation any corporation, company, group, partnership and natural person. (g) In the event that any provision of this Agreement is held by a court of competent jurisdiction or arbitrator to be void, voidable, unlawful or for any reason unenforceable, in whole or in part, such provision will be deemed and construed to extend only to the maximum permitted by law so as to effectuate the intent of the parties, and the remainder of this Agreement will continue in full force and effect and enforceable according to its terms. (h) To the extent that any Confidential Information may include materials subject to the attorney-client privilege, work product doctrine or any other applicable privilege concerning pending or threatened legal proceedings or governmental investigations, each party hereto understands and agrees that both parties hereto and their Representatives have a commonality of interest with respect to such matters and it is the desire, intention and mutual understanding of both parties hereto that the sharing of such Confidential Information is not intended to, and shall not, waive or diminish in any way the confidentiality of such Confidential Information or its continued protection under the attorney-client privilege, work product doctrine or other applicable privilege. All Confidential Information provided by either party hereto that is entitled to such protection under those privileges, this Agreement, and under the joint defense doctrine. CONFIDENTIAL 7(i) This Agreement may be executed by manual or facsimile or other electronically transmitted signatures and in any number of counterparts, each of which will be deemed an original and all which together will constitute one and the same instrument.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that personally identifiable information supplied by the Company to Sony Pictures will be retained and used in accordance with the Sony Pictures Safe Harbor Privacy Policy. The changed text alters this to state that such information will be retained and used at Sony Pictures discretion. This introduces a contradiction, as 'at Sony Pictures discretion' implies that Sony Pictures is not bound by the Safe Harbor Privacy Policy, conflicting with the data protection obligations outlined in Section 21(b) of the contradicted text. This creates a strong inconsistency regarding the use of personally identifiable information.
